broadcast.text: Aubrey hits from sixty and the room drafted seven guys whose names autocorrect doesn't know. We'll take the robot leg, thanks.
broadcast.speaker: homer

broadcast.text: Seven kickers off the board in seven picks and not one of them was the best kicker available. Beautiful chaos.
broadcast.speaker: anchor

broadcast.text: Reading the run and pivoting on the fly, folks. That's the difference between drafting and reacting. Houston's ours.
broadcast.speaker: homer

broadcast.text: Four defenses in four picks — the annual stampede came early this year, and the room's suddenly very interested in special teams.
broadcast.speaker: anchor

broadcast.text: Five receivers deep and every one arrived at a discount. Somebody check if we're allowed to do this.
broadcast.speaker: homer

broadcast.text: Josh Downs fell three full rounds past his number while the room stockpiled fourth quarterbacks. The board never lies, but it does weep.
broadcast.speaker: anchor

broadcast.text: White catches checkdowns like it's a paid hobby. Depth pick now, December flex hero later — you heard it here.
broadcast.speaker: homer

broadcast.text: The board's down to the guys whose highlight reels need context. This is where homework beats vibes.
broadcast.speaker: anchor

broadcast.text: The room drafted every tight end in the hemisphere and left Pittman on the shelf for us twice. Twice! Gift-wrapped.
broadcast.speaker: homer

broadcast.text: Eight tight ends in thirteen picks. Somewhere a fantasy analyst just woke up in a cold sweat and doesn't know why.
broadcast.speaker: anchor

broadcast.text: Pittman catches a hundred quiet balls a year. Bench? Sure. But that's a bench that starts on half the teams in this league.
broadcast.speaker: homer

broadcast.text: Round nine and Mahomes is still sitting there like the last slice at a family dinner — everybody wants it, nobody wants to be seen taking it.
broadcast.speaker: anchor

broadcast.text: Price at ninety-two is the same steal it was yesterday. Some values are so nice we draft 'em twice.
broadcast.speaker: homer

broadcast.text: Dak, Lawrence, and Caleb all found homes in one lap — that's the sound of a league remembering quarterbacks exist.
broadcast.speaker: anchor

broadcast.text: Pitts in this offense is the leap year we keep betting on — but hey, our guy got his tight end and the flex aisle is still open.
broadcast.speaker: homer

broadcast.text: The tight end shelf went from stocked to bare in nine picks. The room learns the same lesson every July and forgets it every August.
broadcast.speaker: anchor

broadcast.text: Daniels over Burrow was the grown-up move — cleaner bye, same ceiling, and the booth never argues with results.
broadcast.speaker: homer

broadcast.text: Five quarterbacks off the board in fifteen picks — the annual midround QB stampede, right on schedule.
broadcast.speaker: anchor

broadcast.text: A tier-one quarterback throwing to Ja'Marr in real life AND on our fantasy team? Poetry. Cincinnati poetry.
broadcast.speaker: homer

broadcast.text: Burrow lasted to the fifties while the room drafted two tight ends nobody's heard of yet. Value finds the patient.
broadcast.speaker: anchor

broadcast.text: Slim Reaper as a WR2. Some teams draft, we assemble. Next up we go quarterback shopping with house money.
broadcast.speaker: homer

broadcast.text: Six receivers in eight picks and DeVonta Smith still slid a full round past his rank. The run giveth.
broadcast.speaker: anchor

broadcast.text: Backfield of Chase Brown and Derrick Henry with Ja'Marr out wide? That's not a rebuild, that's a heist in progress.
broadcast.speaker: homer

broadcast.text: The King in round three. Every year they say he's done, every year somebody gets a discount on twelve hundred yards.
broadcast.speaker: anchor

broadcast.text: Chase THE receiver, now Chase THE runner. Two Chases, zero worries. This booth endorses the brand loyalty.
broadcast.speaker: homer

broadcast.text: Eleven backs in nineteen picks — the room is drinking the same running back Kool-Aid as last night, and the shelf's already wobbling.
broadcast.speaker: anchor

broadcast.text: The best receiver in football just fell into our lap. Don't overthink it, don't blink, sprint the card up.
broadcast.speaker: homer

broadcast.text: Chase past four picks untouched — somebody upstairs likes the five hole tonight.
broadcast.speaker: anchor
